heading: Issuance of rules and regulations for implementation of provisions and coordination with agricultural, research, extension, and teaching provisions
label: 1676 Issuance of rules and regulations for implementation of provisions and coordination with agricultural, research, extension, and teaching provisions
text: The Secretary is authorized to issue such rules and regulations as the Secretary deems necessary to implement the provisions of this subchapter and to coordinate this subchapter with title XIV of the Food and Agriculture Act of 1977 [ et seq.].7 U.S.C. 3101
notes: References in TextThe Food and Agriculture Act of 1977, referred to in text, is , , . Title XIV of the Food and Agriculture Act of 1977, known as the “National Agricultural Research, Extension, and Teaching Policy Act of 1977”, is classified principally to chapter 64 (§ 3101 et seq.) of Title 7, Agriculture. For complete classification of this title to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 95–11391 Stat. 913section 3101 of Title 7Sept. 29, 1977
